text.title: Rust Testing Anti-Patterns and Agent Gotchas Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply rust-testing-antipatterns end-to-end.

step.name: scan-tests
step.action: grep for Utc::now() in assertion paths, tokio::time::sleep in tests, static mut, hardcoded ports.

step.name: inject-clock
step.action: Replace Utc::now() with an injected Clock trait.

step.name: remove-shared-state
step.action: Replace static mut with per-test fixtures.

step.name: install-ci-gate
step.action: Add clippy denies + CI script flagging known patterns.
